label: Ability group
description: Links a set of abilities under a shared cooldown timer. Used by Ideology to enforce a cooldown across the leader's or moralist's abilities.

cooldownTicks.label: Cooldown ticks
cooldownTicks.description: Shared cooldown duration in ticks for all abilities in this group.

sendMessageOnCooldownComplete.label: Send message on cooldown complete
sendMessageOnCooldownComplete.description: If true, sends a UI message to the player when this group's shared cooldown expires.

ritualRoleIds.label: Ritual role IDs
ritualRoleIds.description: Ritual role IDs (free strings) whose ability users share this group's cooldown timer.

basic-ability-group.label: Basic ability group
basic-ability-group.description: A new ability group that links shared cooldown across related abilities.
